description_long: This is a large wooden skateboarding half-pipe structure, featuring a central stairway and platform for access. The ramp is constructed from smooth, varnished wood panels and is adorned with colorful graffiti, including a smiley face, arrows, and various street art motifs. Metal guardrails run along the upper edges of the ramp and the stairway platform, providing safety for users. The structure includes a prominent vertical drop-in section on one end, accessible via a staircase with a wooden enclosure. The base and sides of the ramp are reinforced, and the open central section allows for passage or viewing. The overall design is robust and urban, suitable for skateparks or recreational areas.
description: A large wooden skateboarding half-pipe with graffiti, metal guardrails, and a stairway platform, designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main ramp face, graffiti art, central opening, and the stairway platform on the right.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the curved ramp surface, graffiti on the ramp, and the stairway's position.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden stairway enclosure, additional graffiti, and the open passage beneath the platform.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the vertical drop-in section, the full curve of the half-pipe, and the stairway access.
